news.headline: Cuban government says CIA chief John Ratcliffe met with officials in Havana
news.summary: CIA Director John Ratcliffe met Cuban officials in Havana on Thursday in a bid to improve dialogue between Washington and the communist-run island, the Cuban government said. The meeting took place “in a context marked by the complexity of bilateral relations", Havana said.
